_note: Partner content featuring PLANET, tracked for the internal dashboard's Social tab. Bundled snapshot (no backend) — same pattern as scripts/partners_data.json and scripts/contacted_data.json; edit this file to add entries, then redeploy. `type` classifies the content (Instagram | Blog | Email) — not everything is an IG post: blog features and email blasts carry few or no engagement counts, so likes/comments/shares/sends/views are frequently null on those and that is expected. partner_handle is the IG @handle or a site/list handle; partner_name best-effort matches an existing partner in partners_data.json when the handle/name/domain lines up, else falls back to the handle. Engagement counts are the visible numbers at capture time — null means the count wasn't shown/doesn't apply, which is different from 0, so aggregate stats sum only the metrics that exist and never treat null as zero. `platform` is the human label for where it ran. views is a first-class field but currently null on every entry (view counts weren't visible in any source) — Sofia fills these in as they become available. posted_date is a best-effort ISO date; date_note carries the original relative/approximate wording when the exact date is uncertain. permalink is the entry URL where known.
